title: customFields

fieldValue.description: This can also be an array for fields that need to support list of values; for example, a set of checkboxes. When doing a PUT or POST to the `fieldValue` with a pick list, the input must be a number. The response will be a string.

description: When doing a PUT or POST to the `fieldValue` with a pick list, the input must be a number. The response will be a string.
